items.title: Tesla unfolded its first European “folding Supercharger”
items.body: Tesla's folding Supercharger just arrived in Europe and it changes how fast charging expands. The post Tesla unfolded its first European “folding Supercharger” appeared first on TESLARATI.

items.title: EV sales just hit their best month since federal tax credits ended
items.body: New EV prices continued to slide in May, even as sales climbed to their strongest level since the Trump administration killed federal EV tax credits last fall.

items.title: Tesla just did something in South Korea that no foreign carmaker has ever done
items.body: Tesla's Model Y just became South Korea's best-selling car, beating every domestic model in May. The post Tesla just did something in South Korea that no foreign carmaker has ever done appeared first on TESLARATI.
